insights.title: Forecast → — App Total Revenue likely steady next period — App Total New Subs in line with upstream.
insights.body: App Total New Subs -2.5% moves with its upstream (App Total New User -0.7%); no outsized App Total Revenue swing expected from the trial cohort next period.

insights.title: Lead–lag check — App Total Revenue's -14.6% isn't from acquisition — check churn / pricing / refunds.
insights.body: App Total Revenue 07-07 vs 06-30 = -14.6% runs counter to its 7-day driver App Total New Subs 06-30 vs 06-23 = +1.1% — App Total Revenue's move isn't explained by the prior subs cohort; look at churn, refunds, or pricing rather than acquisition.

insights.title: Funnel conversion — Conversion to New Subs splits by app — YMK softening (-3.5% vs upstream +5.0%).
insights.body: Upstream→New Subs conversion splits by app: YMK -3.5% vs upstream +5.0% (conversion softening). (Revenue is downstream and lags ~7d — see the lead–lag check.)

insights.title: App split — App Total New User -0.7% concentrated in YMK — not platform-wide.
insights.body: App Total New User -0.7% is uneven by app (All App -0.7%, YMK +5.0%, YCP -3.7%) — driven mainly by YMK, not a platform-wide shift.

insights.title: Data gap — 3 slice(s) missing data — excluded from analysis.
insights.body: 3 slice(s) n/a (missing data): All App·All·App Total Install, YCP·All·App Total Install, YMK·All·App Total Install.
